title: Automating .NET 9 Code Refactoring with AI-driven Codemods
summary: This LinkedIn article presents an approach for automating large-scale code refactoring in .NET 9 using AI-driven codemods. The solution leverages AI-augmented Roslyn analyzers, static analysis, and AST manipulation to detect inefficiencies, improve thread safety, optimize LINQ queries, and migrate legacy APIs (e.g., WebClient to HttpClient). It outlines a pipeline from training AI models on code repositories to deploying automated migration pipelines. The future vision includes integrating large language models for complex refactoring patterns and real-time IDE suggestions, aiming to reduce technical debt and enhance maintainability.
author: David Shergilashvili
